scripts.dev:backend: docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init redis && pnpm --filter backend start:dev
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init redis
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init redis
scripts.users:init: test -f users.json || cp users.json.example users.json; echo 'Run pnpm db:migrate && pnpm --filter backend seed:users after infra is up'
